policy_name: Senior Citizens Red Carpet Health Insurance Policy

uin_code.source_quote: Senior Citizens Red Carpet Health Insurance Policy SHAHLIP26041V082526

min_entry_age.source_quote: Eligibility • Entry age between 60 and 75 years • Guaranteed Lifelong renewals

max_entry_age.source_quote: Eligibility • Entry age between 60 and 75 years • Guaranteed Lifelong renewals

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured Options Sum Insured on Individual Basis (Rs.) 1,00,000/- 2,00,000/- 3,00,000/- 4,00,000/- 5,00,000/- 7,50,000/- Sum Insured on Individual & Floater Basis (Rs.) 10,00,000/- 15,00,000/- 20,00,000/- 25,00,000/-

grace_period.source_quote: the policy shall terminate and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days.

free_look_period.source_quote: The Policyholder shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document whether electronically or otherwise to review the terms and conditions of the policy.

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 12 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with insurer

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of following listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an accident

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: medical expenses incurred for a period not exceeding 30 days prior to the date of hospitalization, for disease/illness, injury sustained following an admissible claim for hospitalization under the policy

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 14,000+ network hospitals across India (per official Star Health communications, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Co-Payment: This policy is subject to co-payment of 30% for all claims.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: no No-Claim-Bonus / Cumulative-Bonus benefit percentage stated; 'No Claim Bonus' appears only inside the generic portability/migration continuity-of-credits clause ('the credits (Sum Insured, No Claim Bonus, Specific Waiting Periods, Waiting period for Pre-Existing Diseases, Moratorium period etc.)'), with no NCB benefit percentage for this senior-citizen plan in any indexed chunk (checked all 15 indexed brochure chunks)

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: Policy Term: The policy is available for 1/2/3 years which can be renewed.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment: Medical expenses for Inpatient Hospitalization incurred on treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines in a AYUSH Hospital is payable up to the Sum Insured.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health Check-up: We will arrange for a Preventive Health Check-up at Our Network Providers for the applicable package as specified below as per opted Sum Insured and subject t

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Emergency Hospitalization (Cashless/Reimbursement): Within 24 hours of date and time of Hospitalization if the Insured Person has been hospitalized in an Emergency.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: Senior Citizens Red Carpet Health Insurance Policy Senior Citizens Red Carpet Health Insurance Policy Turning sixty is a major milestone
